item.title: 罗斯百货预计全年销售额将超出预期
item.description: 罗斯百货周二预测其年度销售额将超出华尔街预期，押注在宏观经济不确定性加剧之际，消费者对其折扣服装和配饰的需求仍具韧性。【原文：Ross Stores forecast ​its annual sales ‌above Wall Street estimates ​on Tuesday, ​betting on resilient ⁠demand for ​its discounted ​apparel and accessories amid looming macroeconomic ​uncertainty.】

item.title: 英特尔董事会主席弗兰克·耶里即将离任
item.description: 英特尔周二宣布，董事会主席弗兰克·耶里计划在5月公司年度会议后退休，其职位将由克雷格·巴拉特接任。【原文：Intel ​said on Tuesday that ‌board chair Frank Yeary plans to retire following ​the company's annual ​meeting in May and will ⁠be replaced by ​Craig Barratt.】

item.title: 弗吉尼亚州就儿童社交媒体使用时间限制禁令提起上诉
item.description: 弗吉尼亚州已就法官针对该州一项限制16岁以下儿童每日使用社交媒体不超过一小时的法律所作出的初步禁令提出上诉。【原文：Virginia has appealed a judge's preliminary injunction against a state law limiting ​children under 16 to one hour of ‌social media use a day.】

item.title: 随着伊朗战争升级，美国银行对网络攻击保持高度警惕
item.description: 随着美国对伊朗战争的展开，美国金融服务业正高度警惕潜在的网络攻击。企业正加强监控，防范地缘政治冲突时期常会加剧的威胁，多位高管和分析师如是表示。【原文：The U.S. financial services industry is on heightened ​alert for potential cyberattacks amid the unfolding U.S. war in Iran, with firms stepping up monitoring for ‌threats that often rise during periods of geopolitical conflict, said executives and analysts.】

item.title: 班尼杰与All3Media将合并娱乐业务
item.description: 投资公司RedBird IMI旗下的班尼杰集团与All3Media周二宣布，双方已同意合并旗下娱乐制作业务，共同打造欧洲最大的多媒体制作集团之一。【原文：Banijay Group and All3Media, owned by investment firm RedBird IMI, have agreed ​to merge their entertainment production businesses to create one of Europe's largest multimedia production ‌groups, the companies said on Tuesday.】

item.title: 美国国家运输安全委员会称，Waymo无人驾驶出租车在最新事件中非法超越了停靠的校车。
item.description: 美国国家运输安全委员会周二表示，正在调查1月份发生的一起新事件：Waymo自动驾驶车辆在德克萨斯州违反州法律，超越了已启动警示灯的停靠校车。【原文：The National Transportation Safety Board said Tuesday ​it is investigating a ‌new incident in January of Waymo self-driving vehicles passing a ​stopped school bus with ​its lights activated in violation ⁠of Texas state law.】

item.title: 航空、旅游业因中东冲突余波陷入混乱
item.description: 航空和旅游业正忙于应对美国和以色列对伊朗空袭升级带来的连锁反应，而各国政府则紧急安排滞留中东的旅客返程——短短数日内已有逾两万架次航班取消。【原文：The airline and tourism industries scrambled to deal with the fallout from the escalating U.S. and Israeli air war against Iran, while governments rushed to bring stranded travelers home from ​the Middle East following the cancellation of more than 20,000 flights over a handful of days.】

item.title: 消息人士称，美国国防公司安杜里尔将通过40亿美元融资实现估值翻倍
item.description: 知情人士周二向路透社透露，安杜瑞尔工业公司正寻求从风险投资公司Thrive Capital和安德森·霍洛维茨处筹集约40亿美元资金。【原文：Anduril Industries is seeking to raise about $4 billion from venture capital firms Thrive Capital ​and Andreessen Horowitz, a person familiar with the matter told Reuters ‌on Tuesday.】

item.title: 投资者争相套现，伊朗危机搅乱市场
item.description: 周二，现金在全球市场成为王牌。中东冲突升级导致黄金、债券和股票同步下跌，颠覆了安全资产与风险资产之间的正常互动关系，并推高了市场波动性。【原文：Cash became king in global markets on Tuesday as an escalation in the ​Middle East conflict dragged down gold, bonds and stocks synchronously, upending the normal interplay between safe and riskier assets and driving up volatility.】

item.title: 通用汽车正着手扩大其经销商的二手车业务
item.description: 通用汽车正重塑其美国经销商的二手车销售模式，旨在更好地与Carvana等快速崛起的在线销售商竞争。【原文：General Motors is ​restructuring how its U.S. dealers sell used vehicles, a bid to compete better with fast-rising ‌online sellers like Carvana .】

item.title: 美国食品药品监督管理局警告30家远程医疗公司，因其对复合减肥药的广告存在误导性宣传
item.description: 美国食品药品监督管理局周二表示，已向30家远程医疗公司发出警告信，因其对热门GLP-1减肥药的复方版本作出虚假或误导性宣传。【原文：The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has issued warning letters to 30 telehealth companies for making false or misleading ​claims about compounded versions of popular GLP-1 weight‑loss drugs, the agency ‌said on Tuesday.】

item.title: 美国官员称人工智能合约限制可能危及军事任务
item.description: 五角大楼一位高级官员周二表示，拜登政府时期签署的商用人工智能合同包含广泛的操作限制条款，这些条款可能实时瘫痪美军任务，包括规划和执行作战行动的能力。【原文：A senior Pentagon official said on Tuesday that commercial AI contracts signed under the Biden administration contained sweeping operational restrictions that threatened to paralyze U.S. military missions in ​real time, including the ability to plan and execute combat operations.】

item.title: 美联储卡什卡里称伊朗战争模糊货币政策前景
item.description: 明尼阿波利斯联邦储备银行行长尼尔·卡什卡利周二表示，伊朗冲突加剧了美国经济前景的不确定性，也使得央行利率政策的走向更难预测。【原文：Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis President Neel Kashkari said on Tuesday that the Iran ​conflict has increased uncertainty about the U.S. economic outlook and made it harder to know what lies ahead for central bank interest ‌rate policy.】

item.title: 美国财政部承诺重新审视银行流动性规则
item.description: 美国财政部和银行监管机构正计划对银行流动性规则进行全面审查，认为现行规则效力不足且阻碍了贷款业务。【原文：The U.S. Treasury Department and bank regulators are eyeing a comprehensive review of bank liquidity rules, arguing existing rules are ineffective and ​impede lending.】

item.title: 埃克森美孚高管称数周内将派团队赴委内瑞拉
item.description: 埃克森美孚公司一名高管周二表示，在完成后勤和安保安排后，该公司计划于数周内向委内瑞拉派遣技术团队。【原文：Exxon Mobil aims to send ​a technical team to Venezuela in a ‌few weeks after working through logistical and security arrangements, an executive said on Tuesday.】

item.title: 研究人员称，伊朗交易所遭打击后，价值数百万美元的加密货币已撤离
item.description: 两家区块链分析公司表示，在周六美国和以色列对伊朗发动袭击后的数小时内，伊朗加密货币交易所的资金流出量激增。不过研究人员补充称，目前尚无法确定资金流动背后的具体原因。【原文：Outflows from Iranian crypto exchanges spiked in the hours after the U.S. and Israeli ‌strikes on Iran on Saturday, two blockchain analytics companies said, although researchers added it was not possible to be certain what was behind the moves.】

item.title: 消息人士称，美国正考虑为油轮提供保险支持，以缓解中东原油运输问题
item.description: 据两名消息人士透露，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普将于周二审议一系列政策方案，旨在控制中东冲突升级期间的能源价格，其中包括一项由美国政府协助该地区油轮获取保险的提案。【原文：President Donald Trump will review a set of policy options on Tuesday aimed at controlling energy prices during the escalating Middle East conflict, including a ​proposal for the U.S. government to help oil tankers in the region obtain insurance, two sources said.】

item.title: 美国股市下跌，因伊朗战争担忧加剧
item.description: 周二美国股市抛售加剧，中东冲突扩大推高能源价格，引发投资者对通胀的担忧。【原文：A selloff in US stocks deepened on Tuesday, as widening conflict in the Middle East drove energy prices higher and raised investor concern about inflation.】

item.title: 随着伊朗冲突升级，投资者纷纷涌向货币市场基金寻求避风港。
item.description: 数据显示，随着美以与伊朗的冲突升级，威胁到全球经济增长和通胀稳定，全球投资者周二纷纷涌入货币市场基金，寻求其短期避险吸引力。【原文：Global investors piled into money market funds, data showed on Tuesday, seeking their short-term safety ​appeal as the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran ‌escalated and threatened global growth and inflation stability.】

item.title: MongoDB股价暴跌27%，云业务增长乏力且业绩预期低迷
item.description: 周二，MongoDB股价暴跌27%，创下六个月新低。此前这家软件公司预测其第一季度利润低于预期，且其云数据库产品Atlas季度营收增速放缓令投资者失望。【原文：MongoDB's shares plunged 27% to a six-month low on Tuesday after the software firm forecast first-quarter profit below estimates ​and disappointed investors with slower quarterly revenue growth ‌for its cloud database product Atlas.】

item.title: 惠誉下调派拉蒙信用评级，此前华纳兄弟达成交易
item.description: 评级机构惠誉于周一晚间将派拉蒙天空舞影业和派拉蒙全球的评级下调至垃圾级，此前这家媒体公司提议收购华纳兄弟探索公司。【原文：Credit rating agency Fitch Ratings downgraded Paramount Skydance and Paramount Global's ratings to junk status late on ​Monday following the media company's proposed acquisition of Warner ‌Bros Discovery.】

item.title: 美联储报告显示，去年美国小型企业面临显著的关税价格压力
item.description: 美联储周二发布的报告称，特朗普政府去年实施的大规模进口增税政策以及普遍通胀上升，给美国小企业带来了逆风。【原文：President Donald Trump’s regime of ​large-scale tax increases on imports as well as generalized inflation gains created headwinds for U.S. ‌small businesses last year, a Federal Reserve report released on Tuesday said.】

item.title: NextEra预计到2035年将为数据中心新增高达30吉瓦的电力供应。
item.description: 美国最大电力公司NextEra Energy周二在一次推介会上表示，未来九年计划为美国数据中心新建15至30吉瓦的发电容量。【原文：NextEra Energy , the largest U.S. electricity company, expects to build between 15 and ​30 gigawatts of new generation capacity ‌for U.S. data centers in the next nine years, it said in a presentation on Tuesday.】

item.title: 欧盟企业应对美国关税表现良好，但面临区内障碍，欧洲投资银行调查显示
item.description: 欧洲投资银行周二公布的一项调查显示，欧盟企业正有效应对美国对欧盟商品加征关税的挑战，但因欧盟内部法规不统一，企业反映在欧盟市场销售产品时存在困难。【原文：European Union companies are coping well with higher U.S. tariffs on EU goods, but report problems with selling their products within ​the bloc itself due to fragmented rules and regulations, a ‌European Investment Bank survey showed on Tuesday.】

item.title: 维昂预计今年乌克兰使用星链服务的用户数量将翻倍以上
item.description: 乌克兰电信集团Veon首席执行官周二表示，该国使用SpaceX星链卫星互联网接入的用户数量，预计将从目前的500万增至今年年底的约1200万。【原文：The number of people in Ukraine connecting ‌to the internet using SpaceX's Starlink will probably reach around 12 million by the end of this year from the current 5 million users, the CEO of telecoms group Veon said on Tuesday.】

item.title: 奢侈品牌对中东冲突有多脆弱？
item.description: 中东危机正给奢侈品行业施加压力，该行业本就因需求放缓而举步维艰，历峰集团和杰尼亚等集团受冲击最为严重。【原文：The crisis in the Middle East is adding pressure on the luxury sector, which is already struggling to emerge from a slowdown ​in demand, with groups such as Richemont and Zegna seen ‌among the most exposed.】

item.title: 美联储施密德：通胀过热，不容有丝毫松懈
item.description: 堪萨斯城联邦储备银行行长杰弗里·施密德周二表示，他继续反对进一步降息，称美国劳动力市场处于平衡状态，而通胀过热。【原文：Kansas City Federal Reserve President Jeffrey Schmid on Tuesday signaled his continued opposition to further interest-rate cuts, saying the U.S. labor market is in balance and inflation ​is too hot.】

item.title: 美联储威廉姆斯称降息仍有可能性，未提及伊朗战争
item.description: 纽约联储主席约翰·威廉姆斯周二表示，若通胀压力如他所预期般缓解，美联储将按计划进一步降息。但他未提及伊朗冲突对经济的影响。【原文：New York ​Federal Reserve President John Williams said on Tuesday the U.S. central bank is on track for ‌more interest rate cuts if inflation pressures moderate as he expects, but he did not address the impact of the Iran conflict on the economy.】

item.title: 伊朗局势动荡使市场对美联储下次降息的预期进一步推迟
item.description: 市场对美联储将在9月前重启降息的预期周二进一步减弱，因美以对伊朗发动空袭导致油价上涨，加剧了市场对通胀压力将迫使央行维持鹰派立场的担忧。【原文：Expectations that the Federal Reserve would resume interest rate cuts before September eroded further on Tuesday, as rising oil prices from ​the U.S.-Israeli air war against Iran heightened concern that ‌inflation pressures would keep the central bank in a hawkish posture.】

item.title: 简讯：美国商品期货交易委员会将预测市场规则提案提交至特朗普预算办公室
item.description: 美国商品期货交易委员会已向总统管理和预算办公室提交预测市场的规则制定计划，由此启动了为这个充满争议但发展迅猛的市场制定新规的程序。【原文：The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission ​has sent a rulemaking plan ‌for prediction markets to the President's Office of Management and Budget, kicking ​off the process to ​write new rules for the controversial, ⁠but fast-growing markets.】
